workflowHealth.name: Trust Integrity Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Resolve parity/title/landmark contract failures before certifying dashboard trust posture.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Escalation Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Route trust violations to owning teams quickly and escalate P0 findings within the SLA window.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Weekly Issues Report
workflowHealth.recommendation: Review trust issue clusters and convert repeated failures into owned remediation actions.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Monthly Trends Report
workflowHealth.recommendation: Use monthly trust trend deltas to tighten contracts and prevent trust drift normalization.

riskRows.risk: Signal count parity drifts across dashboard, briefing, and signals surfaces without immediate detection.
riskRows.mitigation: Trust Integrity Agent enforces parity as a P0 contract with daily cadence.

riskRows.risk: Stale relative-time language reappears and undermines trust in recency-sensitive guidance.
riskRows.mitigation: Relative-time phrase checks run in trust integrity contracts and report findings via Slack and artifacts.

riskRows.risk: Trust issues are found but trend direction is unclear, delaying corrective prioritization.
riskRows.mitigation: Weekly issue and monthly trend agents translate failures into directional operating signals.

missing: Automated owner mapping for repeated trust contract failures to reduce triage latency.
Trust contract threshold ratchet that tightens after 30 consecutive healthy days.
Cross-surface parity preflight in staging before production promotion runs.
Contract-specific SLO targets (for example, parity extraction reliability) with rolling error budgets.
